_README: AGENT LAYER of the manufacturability blend. An agent (with engineering
judgment) AUTHORS this: how the design decomposes into FABRICATED parts
vs COTS, the cable/fluid harness, the joints, and each item's PLACEMENT
VALIDATES it and never silently overrides it. Loop: agent edits this ->
solver scores -> agent fixes the flagged items -> repeat until it packs.
GUARDRAIL: a wrong placement still parses as valid JSON. The solver is
